notes: This batch reopens the axis0 boundary/bookkeeping orphan as a standalone result-only slice.
Source membership is bounded to results_axis0_boundary_bookkeep_v1.json and does not merge in the adjacent trajectory-correlation orphan.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch

comparison_anchors.relevance: Provides the already-batched boundary/bookkeep sweep family anchor.
Shows the exact sign1/REC1 family slice that overlaps with the current orphan.
Provides the adjacent result-only orphan that was considered and kept separate due to a different lattice and metric contract.
Provides the earlier local axis0 trajectory-correlation family anchor to help separate the deferred trajectory orphan from the current bookkeeping slice.
Shows catalog listing for both current and deferred axis0 result-only orphan filenames.
Shows zero repo-held evidence-pack visibility for both current and deferred axis0 orphan families.

runtime_expectations: The current surface stores one sign1, two-sequence, two-init bookkeeping slice with trials 512, cycles 64, entangle_reps 1, and record_axis Z.
The current surface is an exact overlapping-metric slice of sign1 REC1 inside results_axis0_boundary_bookkeep_sweep_v2.json.
The current surface carries extra extrema and zero-negativity fields beyond the overlapping sweep slice.
The deferred trajectory orphan remains separate and should be processed next as its own bounded family.
failure_modes: Mistaking orphan status for lack of family anchor.
Treating the current surface as a redundant duplicate of the sweep slice.
Merging results_axis0_traj_corr_suite_v2.json into this batch on catalog adjacency alone.
Reading strong bookkeeping displacement as implied negativity.
Mistaking catalog presence for evidence-pack admission.

sims_split_rule.notes: This batch remains inside the separate sims source class and does not mix with ordinary theory/doc extraction.
